description: Associate a geometry set with the current set. Geometric sets may be added, removed, or cleared for use with the current building blocks set.

6.0.reason: Not listed in the official FLAC3D 6.0 command indexes.

7.0.description: Associate a geometry set with the current set. Geometric sets may be added, removed, or cleared for use with the current building blocks set.

keywords.name: add
keywords.description: Add a geometric set with name s to be associated with current building blocks set.

keywords.name: clear
keywords.description: Clear the list of geometric sets associated with the current building blocks set.

keywords.name: remove
keywords.description: Remove the geometric set with name s from the list of geometric sets associated with the current building blocks set.
